title: AI agents
intro: General-purpose assistants and coding-focused agents that people use as the interface to context-aware workflows.

items.name: ChatGPT
items.description: A generative AI chatbot created by OpenAI that can function as a conversational assistant and as an AI agent.
features: Strong reasoning, coding, and creative text generation capabilities.
Contextual understanding and memory in conversations.
Multilingual support, voice mode, and web search capabilities.
items.models: GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-5, and specialized o-series models.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans and API usage available.

items.name: Gemini
items.description: A generative AI chatbot from Google built on a family of multimodal LLMs.
features: Native multimodality across text, images, audio, video, and code.
Very long context window for processing large amounts of information.
Integration with Google applications such as Gmail, Docs, and Sheets.
items.models: Gemini Ultra, Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Gemini Nano.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans and API pricing available.

items.name: Claude
items.description: An AI assistant and family of LLMs from Anthropic focused on safety and ethical behavior.
features: Advanced reasoning and problem-solving capabilities.
Large context window for long documents.
Vision capabilities for images, charts, and graphs.
items.models: Claude 3.5 Haiku, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Claude Opus 4.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans and API billing available.

items.name: Perplexity AI
items.description: An AI-powered conversational search engine that synthesizes web knowledge into concise answers with citations.
features: Real-time web search capabilities.
Clickable citations for verification.
Focus modes for academic papers or news.
items.models: Access to GPT-4o, Claude 4.0 Sonnet, and proprietary Sonar models.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans for advanced features.

items.name: Gemini CLI
items.description: Google's official CLI interface for Gemini models, enabling code assistance and task automation from the terminal.
features: Natural language code generation and editing.
Shell and file operations integration.
Supports large context windows and multimodal inputs.
items.pricing: Included in Google Cloud's Gemini for Developers tier.

items.name: Claude Code
items.description: Terminal-based interface for Anthropic's Claude models, optimized for coding, debugging, and documentation tasks.
features: Conversational coding assistant in the terminal.
Reads and modifies local files safely.
Integrates with Git and code editors.
items.pricing: Included with Claude Pro and Team plans.

items.name: Aider
items.description: Open-source CLI coding assistant that edits your codebase with GPT, Claude, or Gemini through Git-tracked commits.
features: Works directly on your repo with automatic commits.
Supports multiple LLM backends.
Context-aware editing via diff-based workflow.

items.name: OpenCode
items.description: AI-powered coding platform designed to assist with software development through structured workflows.
features: Supports code generation, editing, and refactoring across projects.
Operates over full repositories with awareness of project structure.
Enables multi-step workflows, including planning and reviewing code.

items.name: Cursor (agent mode)
items.description: AI-native code editor with agent capabilities that can understand, modify, and navigate entire codebases.
features: Deep integration with the code editor for inline edits and multi-file changes.
Agent mode supports autonomous code modifications across a repository.
Context-aware understanding of code structure and dependencies.
